palette: Polished steel and electric blue, accented by deep Frankfurt river-water green and the golden-amber of high-rise office windows at dusk.
lighting: Low-angle winter-spring sunlight cutting through high-density glass; long, crisp shadows against textured concrete. Cool, diffused indoor light from a high-rise studio window.
instagram_prompts: Nanobot POV (microscale): A glowing icosahedron (Lil Mike) perched on the cold, brushed-steel railing of a high-rise balcony in Frankfurt's Ostend district. In the background, the European Central Bank (ECB) tower looms as a towering, out-of-focus monolith against a crisp, pale blue sky. The world is impossibly large. High-contrast lighting, sharp edges, polished surfaces.

Nanobot POV (microscale): Lil Mike sits on a minimalist, textured white desk inside a 'lyf' studio. A cluster of glowing fiber-optic cables (representing Frankfurt's data pulse) is visible in the extreme foreground, out of focus. Through the window, the Frankfurt skyline ('Mainhattan') glows in the golden hour, with its steel-and-glass towers reflecting the dying sun. Deep depth of field, metallic textures.

Nanobot POV (microscale): Lil Mike (glowing cyan icosahedron) hovering inches above a weathered, damp cobblestone street in Frankfurt. In the background, the massive shadow of a modern cloud data center building stretches across the ground. The contrast between ancient European stone and futuristic nanotech is sharp. Wet textures, cool color palette, cinematic lighting.
